content.problemStatement:
Write a C program to define a structure named `Car` that contains two members: `model` (a string, max length 50) and `year` (an integer). Declare two structure variables of type `Car` and initialize them at the time of declaration. The model names and years should be taken as input. Finally, display the details of both cars using `printf()`.


Input Format

The first line contains the model name of the first car (string, max length 50).
The second line contains the manufacturing year of the first car (integer).
The third line contains the model name of the second car (string, max length 50).
The fourth line contains the manufacturing year of the second car (integer).


Output Format

The output should display the details of both cars in the following format:

`Car 1: Model = <model1>, Year = <year1>
Car 2: Model = <model2>, Year = <year2>
`
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases (1 ≤ T ≤ 10). For each test case, four lines follow: 1) model name of the first car (string, length ≤ 50, may contain spaces) 2) manufacturing year of the first car (integer, 1 ≤ year ≤ 2022) 3) model name of the second car (string, length ≤ 50) 4) manufacturing year of the second car (integer, 1 ≤ year ≤ 2022).
content.outputFormat:
For each test case output two lines exactly as:
Car 1: Model = <model1>, Year = <year1>
Car 2: Model = <model2>, Year = <year2>
The lines of consecutive test cases are printed one after another without extra blank lines.

sampleTestCases.output:
Car 1: Model = Sedan, Year = 2018
Car 2: Model = SUV, Year = 2022
sampleTestCases.explanation: T=1. The first car is Sedan built in 2018, the second is SUV built in 2022. The program prints both details in the required format.

sampleTestCases.output:
Car 1: Model = Truck, Year = 2020
Car 2: Model = Car, Year = 2019
Car 1: Model = Van, Year = 2017
Car 2: Model = Bus, Year = 2021
sampleTestCases.explanation: T=2. First test case prints Truck/2020 and Car/2019. Second test case prints Van/2017 and Bus/2021.

sampleTestCases.output:
Car 1: Model = AlphaBetaGammaDeltaEpsilonZetaEtaThetaIotaKappa, Year = 1999
Car 2: Model = LambdaMuNuXiOmicronPiRhoSigmaTauUpsilon, Year = 2000
sampleTestCases.explanation: A single test case with longer model names demonstrates that strings up to the allowed length are handled correctly.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
Car 1: Model = A, Year = 1
Car 2: Model = B, Year = 1

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
Car 1: Model = XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX, Year = 2022
Car 2: Model = YYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY, Year = 2022

hidden.label: uniform/edge case
hidden.expectedOutput:
Car 1: Model = SameModel, Year = 2022
Car 2: Model = SameModel, Year = 2022

hidden.label: tricky case
hidden.expectedOutput:
Car 1: Model = Model X, Year = 1999
Car 2: Model = Model Y, Year = 2000

hidden.label: stress/general
hidden.input:
3
Mini
2005
MiniPlus
2006
Super Car
2022
Eco Car
2021
Z
1
Z
1
hidden.expectedOutput:
Car 1: Model = Mini, Year = 2005
Car 2: Model = MiniPlus, Year = 2006
Car 1: Model = Super Car, Year = 2022
Car 2: Model = Eco Car, Year = 2021
Car 1: Model = Z, Year = 1
Car 2: Model = Z, Year = 1

solution.approach: Read the number of test cases. For each test case read the two model strings using readLine (to keep spaces) and the two years using parseInt. Store them in temporary variables and directly format the required output. No complex data structures are needed; the algorithm runs in O(total input size) time.
solution.timeComplexity: O(total number of characters in the input) – essentially linear in the size of the input.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) extra space besides the input strings and output buffer.

code.Java: import java.io.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));int T=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int tc=0;tc<T;tc++){String model1=br.readLine();int year1=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());String model2=br.readLine();int year2=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());sb.append("Car 1: Model = ").append(model1).append(", Year = ").append(year1).append('\n');sb.append("Car 2: Model = ").append(model2).append(", Year = ").append(year2);if(tc!=T-1) sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
